tasks.instruction: Use the action planner to create a personal conservation plan with exactly five actions, each costing no more than $50 per month and having an impact rating of at least 3 out of 5, then save the plan under a specific name.

tasks.instruction: In the carbon footprint calculator, enter details for a 3-person household to generate a baseline and then create and save a reduction goal targeting at least a 20% decrease.

tasks.instruction: Choose a wildlife conservation project with a transparency rating of at least 4 out of 5 and a suggested monthly donation of $30 or less, and set up a recurring monthly pledge of $25 using the on-site form.

tasks.instruction: Find an ocean conservation webinar or online event scheduled to start after 5:00 PM local time within the next 60 days and register for it, adding it to your events dashboard.
